title: rubus tereticaulis subsp. hontensis
intro: Rubus tereticaulis subsp. hontensis, also known as Korean raspberry or Hontengi, is a type of bramble plant in the rose family. It is a perennial shrub native to Korea, used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood sugar levels, reducing inflammation, and preventing cancer cell growth. Rubus tereticaulis subsp. hontensis can be prepared as tea, tincture, or decoction for medicinal use, and it is also used in some herbal remedies to support digestive health and immune function.
